responses: Hello! Welcome to Srishti Campus. How can I help you today?
Srishti Campus offers Python With Datascience, Digital Marketing,Data Analytics, Robotics,Automation Testing, and AI/ML training programs.

patterns: Tell me about Python with Data Science
Details of Python with Data Science
What is Python with Data Science course?
do you have python with datascience course
responses: The Python with Data Science course covers Python programming, NumPy, Pandas, Matplotlib, Machine Learning basics, and project work. Duration: 6 months.

patterns: do you have digital marketing course
responses: The Digital Marketing course includes SEO, SEM, Google Ads, Social Media Marketing, Email Marketing, and Analytics tools. Duration: 4 months.

patterns: do you have data analytics course
responses: The Data Analytics course focuses on Excel, SQL, Power BI, Tableau, and data visualization techniques. Duration: 5 months.
The Robotics course introduces microcontrollers, Arduino, sensors, and robot automation projects. Duration: 6 months.
The Automation Testing course includes Selenium, Python automation scripts, API testing, and continuous integration basics. Duration: 3 months.

patterns: Tell me about AI and ML
do you have ai ml course
responses: The AI/ML course covers supervised & unsupervised learning, neural networks, deep learning, and AI project deployment. Duration: 6 months.

patterns: how can i apply for admission
responses: You can apply online through the Srishti Campus website or visit the admission office.

patterns: How can I contact Srishti Campus?
can you share the contact information
responses: You can reach us at +91 9778616059 or email info@srishticampus.com.
Goodbye! Have a great day!

patterns: How much do I need to pay?

responses: Course fees vary depending on the program.Please contact 9778616059 or visit our office for detailed fee information.
Yes, Srishti Campus offers placement assistance with leading IT companies and startups. Our placement cell helps with interview preparation and job referrals.
Srishti Campus trainers are industry experts with 5 years of experience in software development, data science, and IT training.

patterns: Is the class online or offline?
responses: Srishti Campus offers both online and offline classes. You can choose your preferred mode of learning based on your convenience.

patterns: What is the duration of the course?
How long does the course take?
can you tell me course duration
what is the length of the course
responses: Most Srishti Campus courses range from 3 to 6 months, depending on the program and your learning pace.

patterns: Give me details about Srishti Campus
responses: Srishti Campus is a premier educational institution dedicated to providing quality training in IT, management, and emerging technologies.
Srishti Campus offers courses in Python, Data Science, Digital Marketing, Robotics, AI/ML, and more. Our mission is to empower students with practical knowledge and skills.
Located in Technopark Trivandrum, Srishti Campus focuses on hands-on learning, industry-ready projects, and 24/7 support for students.
